coldLaunchAndReady.note: Cold launch clears HTTP/SW caches and prior explore run rows, then captures the first fully decoded frame of one newly created unanswered run. Ready rechecks that same asset state, so pixel identity is allowed and recorded explicitly.

q7Reveal.note: Observation and field-book locator details are both paired with the same-build, same-moment full viewport composite.

visualMagnetism.note: Score the runtime contact sheet beside the approved benchmark.

silentComprehensionAndSafety.note: Requires five independent observers and verbatim answers.

production.note: G5 blind value testing and G6 production promotion remain separate.
